name: accounting firms processing 10–20 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 payrolls/month, inaccurate payroll tax filings cause compliance issues. We automate data extraction and reporting instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet tracking.
problem_solved: Inaccurate payroll tax filings lead to compliance issues.
